ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Granted
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
John M. O'Donnell Esq. for Plaintiff: Paccar Financial Corp., A Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: David Moser, District Sales Manager was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Jorge A. Rodriguez for the Principal sum of $47,479.35.
Counsel to submit proposed judgment.

Dec. 20, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
